title: rabdosia inflexa f. leucantha
intro: Rabdosia inflexa f. leucantha is a type of plant, also known as Yung-wu, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, thanks to its rich content of diterpenoid lactones. The health benefits of Rabdosia inflexa f. leucantha include lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, this plant is prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
